channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How social media unspooled Luigi Mangione’s life after UnitedHealthcare CEO’s murder
item.description: The murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last Wednesday sparked a five-day manhunt for the mysterious killer, who left behind irresistible clues like a hidden message on bullet casings and a backpack filled with Monopoly money.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Quantum Computing Breakthrough: Google's Willow Achieves Exponential Error Reduction and Computational Power
item.description: Google's Quantum AI Lab achieves two crucial improvements with its new quantum chip, Willow, overcoming error correction challenges and demonstrating computational power for practical applications.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A CIO’s framework for measuring engineering productivity
item.description: In boardrooms across the tech industry, CTOs and CIOs face a common challenge: effectively communicating and demonstrating IT productivity to leadership.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: California defense contractors optimistic Trump administration could create jobs
item.description: The Reagan National Defense Survey done just after the November election found that 79% of those surveyed want the U.S. to spend more on national defense.
item.dc:creator: Erika I. Ritchie, The Mercury News

item.title: TikTok files challenge against Canadian government order to dissolve its business in the country
item.description: TikTok has challenged a Canadian government order to shut down the Chinese video-sharing app’s business operations in the country that was imposed over national security concerns.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Not so ‘Wicked’ after all. Find authenticity in the era of AI
item.description: I recently had the opportunity to see Wicked, the cinematic adaptation of the acclaimed Broadway musical. Directed by Jon M. Chu, this film serves as the first installment of a two-part series that explores the origins of the beloved characters before the events of The Wizard of Oz.
item.dc:creator: R. Vann Graves, Fast Company

item.title: Kylie Kelce unseats Joe Rogan as top podcast with debut episode
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of NFL player-turned-media personality Jason Kelce, beat out Joe Rogan for the top podcast spot on both Apple and Spotify this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: U.S. consumers who were tricked into purchases they didn’t want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: Wyatte Grantham-Philips, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Total Quality Logistics: Building a ‘talent destination’ through employee engagement
item.description: Don’t talk about industry slowdowns to Total Quality Logistics (TQL), which has made its largest-ever technology investments over the past three years to bring greater agility and resilience to the business.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Social media influencer is a growing career choice. Colleges have noticed
item.description: Have influencers on social media created a new career field worthy of formal education? A growing number of universities are looking at classes and majors aimed at giving influencers the skills needed to spot misinformation, communicate effectively with audiences and understand business contracts t
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Scale smarter, not harder: How network-as-a-service (NaaS) is transforming mid-market IT
item.description: Mid-market organizations often find themselves in a difficult position: they need to scale rapidly and digitally transform their businesses without huge financial, technological and human resources at their disposal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IBM Develops Optical Chips to Boost Data Center Performance
item.description: IBM researchers are working on co-packaged optics (CPO) technology to enhance data center performance, enabling better AI applications and lower energy costs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX
item.description: Michelyne LeBlanc, the deputy CIO of the Defense Commissary Agency, said the move to zero trust is all about ensuring customer confidence in its services. The post Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: San Jose pushes AI to provide better government to constituents
item.description: The collaboration between members of the GovAI coalition is spurring the adoption of new technologies and AI-solutions by government agencies.
item.dc:creator: Devan Patel, The Mercury News

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts
item.description: The bill would require DoD to use a competitive award process when contracting with cloud, advanced AI systems or data infrastructure vendors. The post Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: OpenAI releases o1 LLM, unveils ChatGPT Pro
item.description: OpenAI has officially released its OpenAI o1 large language model (LLM), built for complex reasoning. The company also introduced ChatGPT Pro, a $200 monthly plan that includes unlimited access to OpenAI o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and advanced voice conversations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
